caption: Morning Sadhana — A peaceful beginning with mantra meditation, prayer, and shared intention for the day.
Scripture Study — Collaborative reading circles create space for questions, insight, and personal application.
Prasadam Preparation — Cooking and serving become joyful acts of devotion and community care.
Festival Evenings — Music, kirtan, and celebration bring the academy together in gratitude and joy.
Shared Seva — Hands-on service cultivates humility, cooperation, and servant leadership.
Quiet Reflection — Students also have space for solitude, journaling, and contemplative rest.
